title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. baeticum
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. baeticum, also known as the Baetic Star of Bethlehem or Baetic Ornithogalum, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the Asparagaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant actions, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum var. baeticum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
